required_checks.description: HTML page has a responsive viewport meta tag
HTML page exposes a primary heading through semantic or obvious visual-title markup
HTML page exposes a navigation landmark or obvious nav container
HTML page includes a responsive breakpoint or an obvious responsive layout pattern

warning_checks.description: HTML page appears to provide at least one action affordance
HTML page includes an explicit page-purpose or workflow cue
warning_checks.pattern: purpose|workflow|how it works|page-purpose|start here|what you can do

warning_checks.description: Evidence-heavy pages should usually expose source or evidence language
